query: I need a 3-day travel itinerary for two people, departing from Newark and visiting Savannah from March 3rd to March 5th, 2022. We have a budget of $1,400. We'll be traveling with children under 10, so accommodations must be suitable for them. Our dietary preferences include Mediterranean, Mexican, French, and Indian cuisines, and we would appreciate food recommendations that cater to these preferences. Please note that we're not planning on self-driving.

plan.attraction: Forsyth Park;Jepson Center & Telfair Children's Art Museum (CAM);Savannah Children's Museum;

plan.breakfast: Brown House Cafe (Tea, Pizza, Mexican), Savannah
plan.attraction: Savannah Historic District;Old Fort Jackson;Wormsloe State Historic Site;
plan.lunch: The Mad Teapot/The Wishing Chair (Mexican, Bakery), Savannah
plan.dinner: Cooks Cafe - Jaypee Greens (Cafe, Bakery, Mediterranean), Savannah

plan.breakfast: Manohar Dairy And Restaurant (Tea, Indian), Savannah
plan.attraction: Savannah's Waterfront;Andrew Low House;Savannah History Museum;
